patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
index 48a8627ab63e..17f6a668dda6 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
@@ -10342,9 +10342,14 @@ BoUpSLP::getEntryCost(const TreeEntry *E, ArrayRef<Value *> VectorizedVals,
         // resized.
         if (!UnaryInstruction::isCast(E->getOpcode()) && E->Idx != 0 &&
             (E->getOpcode() != Instruction::Load ||
-             !E->UserTreeIndices.empty())) {
+             !E->UserTreeIndices.empty()) &&
+            !E->UserTreeIndices.empty()) {
           const EdgeInfo &EI = E->UserTreeIndices.front();
-          if ((EI.UserTE->getOpcode() != Instruction::Select ||
+          // EdgeIdx may be UINT_MAX for synthetic/gather relationships without
+          // a concrete operand index. In such cases, skip the type resizing
+          // logic that relies on accessing the parent's operand list.
+          if (EI.EdgeIdx != UINT_MAX &&
+              (EI.UserTE->getOpcode() != Instruction::Select ||
                EI.EdgeIdx != 0) &&
               It != MinBWs.end()) {
             auto UserBWIt = MinBWs.find(EI.UserTE);
test_traj:

         // resized.
         if (!UnaryInstruction::isCast(E->getOpcode()) && E->Idx != 0 &&
             (E->getOpcode() != Instruction::Load ||
-             !E->UserTreeIndices.empty())) {
+             !E->UserTreeIndices.empty()) &&
+            !E->UserTreeIndices.empty()) {
           const EdgeInfo &EI = E->UserTreeIndices.front();
-          if ((EI.UserTE->getOpcode() != Instruction::Select ||
+          // EdgeIdx may be UINT_MAX for synthetic/gather relationships without
+          // a concrete operand index. In such cases, skip the type resizing
+          // logic that relies on accessing the parent's operand list.
+          if (EI.EdgeIdx != UINT_MAX &&
+              (EI.UserTE->getOpcode() != Instruction::Select ||
                EI.EdgeIdx != 0) &&
               It != MinBWs.end()) {
             auto UserBWIt = MinBWs.find(EI.UserTE);
